title: Australia’s ‘Prettiest Street’ Is Grappling With TikTok and Instagram Fame
summary_full: For many years, Tasman Drive in Gerringong was a secret held by locals. Now residents must coexist with tourists hungry for the perfect shot.
summary_public: For many years, Tasman Drive in Gerringong was a secret held by locals. Now residents must coexist with tourists hungry for the perfect shot.
